source.description: Daily refreshed baseline + market quote signals

procurement_action_template.dual_source: Parallel primary and backup qualification where feasible
procurement_action_template.delivery_plan: Back-schedule rack delivery from memory and packaging availability

procurement_action_template.dual_source: Dual source for new programs and backup validation for mass production
procurement_action_template.delivery_plan: Quarterly cadence review and lead-time correction

procurement_action_template.delivery_plan: Quarterly cadence review and lead-time correction

procurement_action_template.dual_source: Dual source for new programs and backup validation for mass production
procurement_action_template.delivery_plan: Quarterly cadence review and lead-time correction
Demand spike trigger threshold to avoid overstock

summary_i18n.zh: AI PCB 是服务器整机交付的关键承接层，低损耗、高层数与高速信号完整性共同决定供给弹性。
summary_i18n.en: AI PCB is a critical execution layer for server delivery, where low-loss materials, high-layer builds, and SI integrity define supply elasticity.

zh: AI 服务器平台刷新带动高层板需求
更高功耗/更高速率提升材料要求
板级设计复杂度继续上升
en: Platform refresh supports high-layer PCB demand
Higher power and speed tighten material requirements
Board-level design complexity continues to rise

zh: 高层数板制程
低损耗材料供应
认证周期与良率爬坡
en: High-layer board process capability
Low-loss material supply
Qualification cycle and yield ramp

zh: 高层板与 HDI 交付周期仍是核心变量，客户对双供的偏好更明确
en: High-layer and HDI lead times remained key variables, with stronger dual-source preference

zh: 重点看主力厂接单节奏和认证推进，判断产能是否开始松动
en: Focus on booking pace and qualification progress to gauge early supply easing

zh: 若低损耗材料供应或良率爬坡跟不上，交付压力会快速回升
en: Lagging material supply or yield ramp could quickly re-accelerate delivery pressure

turning_point_signal_i18n.zh: 当紧缺分连续 2 周下行且交付执行稳定时，拐点信号增强
turning_point_signal_i18n.en: Turning-point confidence rises when shortage score declines for 2+ weeks with stable lead-time execution

zh: 锁定框架产能并保持替代来源可切换
为每代产品设置双供 readiness 检查点
在约束期优先保障关键 SKU
en: Lock framework capacity and keep alternate source paths warm
Set dual-source readiness checkpoints per generation
Prioritize critical SKUs during constrained windows

zh: AI 基础设施升级仍提供结构性需求支撑
供给瓶颈有望逐步缓解但节奏不均
14-30 天趋势一致性越高，拐点判断越可靠
en: AI infrastructure upgrades continue to support structural demand
Supply bottlenecks are likely to ease gradually but unevenly
Turning-point confidence improves with 14-30 day trend consistency

summary_i18n.zh: 需求主轴仍在模型训练、推理扩容与服务器刷新，GPU 仍是整个链条的最强定价锚。
summary_i18n.en: Demand remains anchored by training and inference expansion, with GPU still the strongest pricing pillar across the chain.

zh: 超大规模训练集群持续扩容
推理侧带来更广泛的出货基础
新架构迭代同时抬升封装和 HBM 拉动
en: Hyperscale training clusters keep expanding
Inference demand broadens shipment base
New GPU cycles pull both packaging and HBM demand

zh: HBM 供给节拍
先进封装排产
整机功耗与散热设计
en: HBM supply cadence
Advanced packaging slotting
System-level power and thermal constraints

zh: 云厂商 capex 维持高位，主流平台出货节奏仍偏强
en: Cloud capex stayed elevated and major platform shipments remained strong

zh: 继续观察新平台 SKU 放量和整机交付 lead time 是否稳定
en: Watch whether new SKU ramps and system lead-time execution remain stable

zh: 若 HBM 或封装排产再度吃紧，GPU 端交付会被动拉长
en: If HBM or packaging tightens again, GPU system lead times may extend

turning_point_signal_i18n.zh: 当紧缺分连续 2 周下行且交付执行稳定时，拐点信号增强
turning_point_signal_i18n.en: Turning-point confidence rises when shortage score declines for 2+ weeks with stable lead-time execution

zh: 锁定框架产能并保持替代来源可切换
为每代产品设置双供 readiness 检查点
在约束期优先保障关键 SKU
en: Lock framework capacity and keep alternate source paths warm
Set dual-source readiness checkpoints per generation
Prioritize critical SKUs during constrained windows

zh: AI 基础设施升级仍提供结构性需求支撑
供给瓶颈有望逐步缓解但节奏不均
14-30 天趋势一致性越高，拐点判断越可靠
en: AI infrastructure upgrades continue to support structural demand
Supply bottlenecks are likely to ease gradually but unevenly
Turning-point confidence improves with 14-30 day trend consistency

summary_i18n.zh: HBM 仍是 AI 服务器最关键的紧缺件之一，容量扩张与良率爬坡决定供需改善速度。
summary_i18n.en: HBM remains a core constraint in AI servers, and the pace of capacity and yield ramp drives normalization speed.

zh: 训练/推理都在提高单卡带宽要求
高堆叠容量已成为平台升级前提
HBM3E/HBM4 认证推进带来替换窗口
en: Training and inference both raise per-device bandwidth demand
Higher stack capacity is now a platform prerequisite
HBM3E/HBM4 qualification creates replacement windows

zh: 封装与测试产能
高堆叠良率
先进节点材料与基板协同
en: Packaging and test capacity
High-stack yield improvement
Coordination with advanced-node materials and substrate

zh: 头部厂扩产继续推进，但有效供给释放仍受良率约束
en: Capacity expansion progressed, but effective supply remains yield-constrained

zh: 关注客户认证结果和季度出货结构是否向更高堆叠产品迁移
en: Track qualification outcomes and shipment mix migration to higher stacks

zh: 若认证延后或良率改善慢于预期，紧缺度会维持高位
en: Delayed qualification or slower yield gains could keep tightness elevated

turning_point_signal_i18n.zh: 当紧缺分连续 2 周下行且交付执行稳定时，拐点信号增强
turning_point_signal_i18n.en: Turning-point confidence rises when shortage score declines for 2+ weeks with stable lead-time execution

zh: 锁定框架产能并保持替代来源可切换
为每代产品设置双供 readiness 检查点
在约束期优先保障关键 SKU
en: Lock framework capacity and keep alternate source paths warm
Set dual-source readiness checkpoints per generation
Prioritize critical SKUs during constrained windows

zh: AI 基础设施升级仍提供结构性需求支撑
供给瓶颈有望逐步缓解但节奏不均
14-30 天趋势一致性越高，拐点判断越可靠
en: AI infrastructure upgrades continue to support structural demand
Supply bottlenecks are likely to ease gradually but unevenly
Turning-point confidence improves with 14-30 day trend consistency

summary_i18n.zh: 先进封装是 GPU/HBM 放量的同步约束，产能与工艺窗口决定整条链的兑现速度。
summary_i18n.en: Advanced packaging remains a synchronized constraint for GPU/HBM ramp, with capacity and process windows determining chain throughput.

zh: Chiplet 和高算力平台渗透率上升
2.5D/3D 方案提高单位封装价值量
大客户拉货对产线优先级的虹吸效应
en: Rising Chiplet and high-compute platform penetration
2.5D/3D adoption lifts packaging value per unit
Large-customer pull continues to absorb line priority

zh: CoWoS/类似产线排程
ABF/载板/中介层协同
测试与良率爬坡
en: CoWoS-like line scheduling
ABF/substrate/interposer coordination
Test throughput and yield ramp

zh: 大客户需求仍在虹吸产线，扩产节奏继续是市场关注点
en: Key-customer demand kept absorbing line priority, and expansion pace stayed in focus

zh: 观察封装厂扩产计划和中介层/基板备料是否同步到位
en: Watch whether packaging expansion and interposer/substrate material readiness stay aligned

zh: 若测试良率或排产受阻，整条 AI 服务器链交付会继续被拖慢
en: If testing yield or scheduling slips, AI server delivery could remain constrained

turning_point_signal_i18n.zh: 当紧缺分连续 2 周下行且交付执行稳定时，拐点信号增强
turning_point_signal_i18n.en: Turning-point confidence rises when shortage score declines for 2+ weeks with stable lead-time execution

zh: 锁定框架产能并保持替代来源可切换
为每代产品设置双供 readiness 检查点
在约束期优先保障关键 SKU
en: Lock framework capacity and keep alternate source paths warm
Set dual-source readiness checkpoints per generation
Prioritize critical SKUs during constrained windows

zh: AI 基础设施升级仍提供结构性需求支撑
供给瓶颈有望逐步缓解但节奏不均
14-30 天趋势一致性越高，拐点判断越可靠
en: AI infrastructure upgrades continue to support structural demand
Supply bottlenecks are likely to ease gradually but unevenly
Turning-point confidence improves with 14-30 day trend consistency

summary_i18n.zh: ABF 基板处于高端载板供给的咽喉位置，AI 芯片叠层复杂度持续抬升单位面积需求。
summary_i18n.en: ABF sits at the chokepoint of high-end substrate supply as AI chip stacking complexity keeps raising area demand.

zh: 高 I/O 高层数封装需求上升
服务器平台升级推高材料规格
低损耗/高层数产品占比提升
en: Higher I/O and layer-count packaging demand
Server platform upgrades push material specs upward
Share of low-loss/high-layer products keeps rising

zh: 高层数良率
玻纤/树脂/铜箔材料协同
扩产爬坡周期长
en: High layer-count yield
Glass fiber/resin/copper coordination
Long ramp cycle for capacity additions

zh: 高层数和低损耗料号仍是主线，头部厂排产优先级较高
en: High-layer and low-loss parts remained priority with stronger line allocation at top suppliers

zh: 跟踪主力厂扩线公告和客户试产节奏，判断供给改善拐点
en: Track line-expansion announcements and customer pilot cadence for a supply inflection read

zh: 若玻纤/树脂/铜箔协同不足，ABF 仍会在局部规格上卡脖子
en: Insufficient material coordination could keep ABF tight in select specifications

turning_point_signal_i18n.zh: 当紧缺分连续 2 周下行且交付执行稳定时，拐点信号增强
turning_point_signal_i18n.en: Turning-point confidence rises when shortage score declines for 2+ weeks with stable lead-time execution

为每代产品设置双供 readiness 检查点
在约束期优先保障关键 SKU
en: Lock framework capacity and keep alternate source paths warm
Set dual-source readiness checkpoints per generation
Prioritize critical SKUs during constrained windows

14-30 天趋势一致性越高，拐点判断越可靠

Supply bottlenecks are likely to ease gradually but unevenly
Turning-point confidence improves with 14-30 day trend consistency

summary_i18n.zh: 高速连接器的价值在于信号完整性和装配可靠性，平台升级会放大头部供应商的认证壁垒。
summary_i18n.en: High-speed connector value is concentrated in signal integrity and assembly reliability, where platform upgrades reinforce top-vendor qualification barriers.

zh: GPU/交换机/机柜链路速率提升
更高功耗推动高可靠连接方案
模块化平台加大接口数量
en: Rising link rates across GPU/switch/rack paths
Higher power pushes high-reliability connector designs
Modular platforms increase interface count

zh: 材料与接触电阻控制
高速认证周期
结构件和装配公差
en: Material and contact-resistance control
High-speed qualification cycle
Mechanical tolerance and assembly precision

zh: 接口速率升级带动新品导入，头部厂仍占据认证优势
en: Rate upgrades supported new program introductions and top vendors retained qualification advantage

zh: 观察平台接口规格变化和 OEM 新料号导入节奏
en: Monitor interface spec changes and OEM new part-number introductions

zh: 若材料或接触电阻控制不稳，高速链路良率会先受影响
en: Unstable material/contact control may impact high-speed link yield first

turning_point_signal_i18n.zh: 当紧缺分连续 2 周下行且交付执行稳定时，拐点信号增强
turning_point_signal_i18n.en: Turning-point confidence rises when shortage score declines for 2+ weeks with stable lead-time execution

zh: 锁定框架产能并保持替代来源可切换
为每代产品设置双供 readiness 检查点
在约束期优先保障关键 SKU

供给瓶颈有望逐步缓解但节奏不均
14-30 天趋势一致性越高，拐点判断越可靠

Supply bottlenecks are likely to ease gradually but unevenly
Turning-point confidence improves with 14-30 day trend consistency

summary_i18n.zh: MLCC 在 AI 服务器链中更偏稳定消耗件，但高容高压与高频料号仍会出现局部紧张。
summary_i18n.en: MLCC is generally more stable in AI servers, though high-cap/high-voltage and high-frequency parts can still tighten selectively.

zh: 电源管理与去耦需求提升
服务器功耗上行带来更高规格料号占比
车规/工控与 AI 共享产能
en: Power management and decoupling demand rise
Server power growth increases high-spec part mix
Automotive/industrial demand shares capacity with AI

zh: 高端小型化料号产能
关键客户配额
高频高容规格切换
en: Capacity for advanced miniaturized parts
Priority allocation to key accounts
Switching cadence for high-frequency/high-cap specs

zh: 整体偏稳定，但高规格料号仍能看到局部拉货
en: Overall conditions were stable, while selective pull-ins appeared in premium SKUs

zh: 继续跟踪头部厂稼动率、高端料号交期和客户库存回补节奏
en: Keep tracking utilization, premium-SKU lead time, and customer restocking rhythm

zh: 若客户集中补库，高频高容料号会先出现周期性紧张
en: Concentrated restocking could tighten high-frequency/high-cap SKUs first

turning_point_signal_i18n.zh: 当紧缺分连续 2 周下行且交付执行稳定时，拐点信号增强
turning_point_signal_i18n.en: Turning-point confidence rises when shortage score declines for 2+ weeks with stable lead-time execution

在约束期优先保障关键 SKU
